_publications._publicationTitle: FAP expression as a marker of malignant transformation enabling in vivo characterization in peripheral nerve sheath tumors: a multimodal and translational study.

_contextSnippet: we performed FAP-IHC on archival human tissue samples of MPNSTs (n = 12) as well as conventional neurofibromas (n = 12)
details: Successfully performed automated immunohistochemical staining for FAP analysis in MPNST and neurofibroma tissue samples
